호세아 6:1.content: “Come! Let’s return to Yahweh; for he has torn us to pieces, and he will heal us; he has injured us, and he will bind up our wounds.

호세아 6:2.content: After two days he will revive us. On the third day he will raise us up, and we will live before him.

호세아 6:3.content: Let’s acknowledge Yahweh. Let’s press on to know Yahweh. As surely as the sun rises, Yahweh will appear. He will come to us like the rain, like the spring rain that waters the earth.”

호세아 6:4.content: “Ephraim, what shall I do to you? Judah, what shall I do to you? For your love is like a morning cloud, and like the dew that disappears early.

호세아 6:5.content: Therefore I have cut them to pieces with the prophets; I killed them with the words of my mouth. Your judgments are like a flash of lightning.

호세아 6:6.content: For I desire mercy, and not sacrifice; and the knowledge of God more than burnt offerings.

호세아 6:7.content: But they, like Adam, have broken the covenant. They were unfaithful to me, there.

호세아 6:8.content: Gilead is a city of those who work iniquity; it is stained with blood.

호세아 6:9.content: As gangs of robbers wait to ambush a man, so the company of priests murder on the path toward Shechem, committing shameful crimes.

호세아 6:10.content: In the house of Israel I have seen a horrible thing. There is prostitution in Ephraim. Israel is defiled.

호세아 6:11.content: “Also, Judah, there is a harvest appointed for you, when I restore the fortunes of my people.
